name: accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inconsistent accounting entries cause cash flow gaps. We convert vendor payment remittance data into accounting entries instead of manual entry and reconciliation of accounting data.
problem_solved: inconsistent accounting entries from vendor payment remittance data
features: manual data entry for vendor payments

locked_fields.primary_problem: inconsistent accounting entries from vendor payment remittance data
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inconsistent accounting entries cause cash flow gaps. We convert vendor payment remittance data into accounting entries instead of manual entry and reconciliation of accounting data.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual entry and reconciliation of accounting data
must_have_features: manual data entry for vendor payments

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inconsistent accounting entries cause cash flow gaps. We convert vendor payment remittance data into accounting entries instead of manual entry and reconciliation of accounting data.
